Confirm Payment.description: Confirms an existing payment, also known as a PaymentIntent.

Create Payment.description: Creates a new payment, also known as a PaymentIntent.

API Request (Beta).description: This is an advanced action which makes a raw HTTP request that includes this integration's authentication.

Find Account Balance.description: Finds the account balance for your stripe account

Find Account by ID.description: Finds a Stripe account by its ID.

Find Balance Transactions.description: Finds transactions that have contributed to the Stripe account balance, such as charges, transfers, and more.

Find Charge.description: Finds an existing charge by its Stripe ID.

Find Customer.description: Finds an existing customer by their Stripe ID or email address.

Find Invoice.description: Finds an existing invoice by its Stripe ID.

Find Payment.description: Finds an existing payment intent by its Stripe ID.
